Stories & Blogs

T‑Mobile Joins the STRIKE Initiative

T‑Mobile recently joined the STRIKE Initiative (Strategic Threat Response & Infrastructure Knowledge Exchange), an industry effort focused on helping protect communications infrastructure from theft, vandalism and other disruptions. In the post below, Lori Ames, Senior Vice President, Network Infrastructure and Operations at T‑Mobile, shares more about the initiative and the importance of industry collaboration. ###
